name: The Graph Subgraph GraphQL API
description: The Graph is an indexing protocol for organizing and querying blockchain data. It allows developers to build and publish open APIs called subgraphs that applications can query using GraphQL. Each subgraph has its own unique query URL on The Graph Network gateway.
